ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ui_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UI component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the UI component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the UI component (e.g., dropdown, button) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the component was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the component was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the component */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the component is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component this attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., model-value, multiple) */,
  "attribute_description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of the attribute (e.g., string, number) */,
  "accepted_values" TEXT /* Accepted values for the attribute */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the attribute */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the attribute is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_attributes" (
  "custom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom attribute */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component this custom attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the custom attribute */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the custom attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("custom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_attributes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_attributes_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main component */,
  "dependent_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that depends on the main component */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dependency was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_dependent_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute value */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute this value belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the value was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_values_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component configuration */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component this configuration belongs to */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute this configuration is for */,
  "value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the value for the attribute */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_configs_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_configs_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("value_id") REFERENCES attribute_values ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_configs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that was changed */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the attribute */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the attribute */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
